---
title: 'Images_Projects'
date: '2023-08-21T04:09:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Topos Creative, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '2717951121131798557'
blogger_filename: '/p/images.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Creative, LLC/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: left;">&nbsp;Images for projects and posts</h3><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Coursera-Case Study, Track_1,Case_study_1, Cyclistic-bike-share-analysis</h4><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bar-members-vs-casual-440f82e9902e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1700" data-original-width="2284" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bar-members-vs-casual-3836c488a21c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/max-ride-length-34fe8a7c502f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1700" data-original-width="2284" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/max-ride-length-fd94a13cea06.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mean-ride-length-e0506f529ccb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1700" data-original-width="2284" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mean-ride-length-01fbe1bfe7fa.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/median-ride-length-47bb911754ac.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1700" data-original-width="2284" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/median-ride-length-08eb4fe4150b.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboard-stations-1-eb9750f71415.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="313" data-original-width="1173" height="85" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboard-stations-1-bd8f5a70670d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboard-stations-2-491c81f47d85.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="107" data-original-width="412" height="83" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboard-stations-2-2210fd3107ff.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboardoverview-8a7904c6fc5d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="125" data-original-width="820" height="49" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-datamodel-dashboardoverview-3f79b5ba9ce4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rstudio-database-connection-f25c289e082b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="190" data-original-width="378" height="161" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rstudio-database-connection-6e4083c559ce.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rstudio-dataframe-ggplot-1-ca9369665d1a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1041" data-original-width="1921" height="173" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rstudio-dataframe-ggplot-1-4a2c37c73b60.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-bulk-insert-errors-7aa1de3e0058.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1041" data-original-width="1921" height="173" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-bulk-insert-errors-637a0e4ea2f2.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-createdatabase-407406298707.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="270" data-original-width="334" height="259" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-createdatabase-70ccd8c1136c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-viewdata-68cc7873caa7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="353" data-original-width="1031" height="110" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-viewdata-92b6d53c2230.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-viewdata-allcomplete-956b2ef91a52.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1041" data-original-width="1921" height="173" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/visualstudio2022-viewdata-allcomplete-c778691e375d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-data-csv-location-72c719fb405c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="358" data-original-width="1170" height="98" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-data-csv-location-20444338daa7.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div><br /></div><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p>
